description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that installs tox globally in a before_script, then defines a linters job using the python:3.13-slim Docker image that runs tox -e readme, and a test job that runs in parallel across a matrix of PYTHON_VERSION values (3.8,3.9,3.10,3.11,3.12,3.13) using the corresponding python:${PYTHON_VERSION}-slim image and executes tox -e "py". Both jobs run in the default test stage and no caches, artifacts, or special rules are configured.
